title: World Usability Day
body:
[![World Usability Day 2011](http://www.xarop.com/dev/wp-content/uploads/2011/11/WUD2011-e1320708642186.jpg "World Usability Day 2011")](http://www.worldusabilityday.org/)  

## Today [World Usability Day](http://www.worldusabilityday.org/ "worldusabilityday.org") is celebrated

This year's theme will be "[Education, Design for Social Change](http://www.worldusabilityday.org/)", honoring [Steve Jobs' legacy](http://www.xarop.com/steve-jobs/ "Steve Jobs thought differently").

## [What is usability?](http://www.xarop.com/que-es-la-usabilidad/ "What is usability?")
